nasb.text: You shall not cut off your lovingkindness from my house forever, not even when the Lord cuts off every one of the enemies of David from the face of the earth.”

esv.text: and do not cut off your steadfast love from my house forever, when the Lord cuts off every one of the enemies of David from the face of the earth.”

cnv.text: 我死了以後，耶和華從地上一一剪除大衛的仇敵的時候，你也不可向我的家永遠斷絕你的慈愛。”

ccb.text: 在我死后，即使耶和华把你所有的仇敌都毁灭了，请你仍旧恩待我的后人。”
